global_definition: Internationally mobile tertiary students; country of origin is ideally prior education, then residence, with citizenship used only where necessary.
global_corridor_scope: Selected major corridors published in annual Wissenschaft weltoffen figures from 2016 onward. Source figures use an approximately 15,000-student display threshold; this layer is not a complete bilateral matrix.
europe_definition: Cumulative Erasmus+ Key Action 1 learning-mobility participant flows between sending and receiving countries since 2014, through the 2024 data release.
break_note: The European Erasmus+ section is not a continuation of the global degree-mobility series. It measures a different form of learning mobility.
map_projection: Projection-matched equirectangular basemaps generated locally from Natural Earth low-resolution boundaries.
